cardiology.ex: He is a professor of cardiology at the medical school.

cardiovascular.ex: Regular exercise is good for your cardiovascular health.

care.def: 關心、照料、小心、憂慮、關心、照料的人人物、小心地 (關)
care.col: take care of, care for, who cares? (誰在乎), customer care
care.ex: She takes very good care of her younger brother.

careen.def: (船)傾斜、(車)橫衝直撞地行駛、傾斜的人地 (側)
careen.ex: The car began to careen wildly down the mountain road.

career.def: 職業、生涯、快速前進、從事職業者、快速地 (職)
career.col: career path, medical career, career diplomat
career.ex: She decided to pursue a professional career in music.

carefree.def: 無憂無慮的、輕鬆地 (無憂)
carefree.ex: They spent a happy and carefree childhood on the farm.

careful.def: 小心的、仔細的、有計畫地 (慎)
careful.ex: Please be careful with that fragile glass vase.

carefully.ex: He studied the map carefully before starting the hike.

carefulness.ex: The experiment requires extreme carefulness and patience.

careless.def: 粗心的、隨便的、輕鬆地 (粗)
careless.ex: He failed the test because of a few careless mistakes.

carelessly.def: 粗心地、漫不經心地、隨意地
carelessly.ex: I carelessly forgot to lock the front door this morning.

carelessness.ex: The fire was caused by the pure carelessness of a camper.

caress.def: 呵護、愛惜地觸摸、吻、愛撫的人的人物、呵護地 (愛)
caress.ex: She gave the crying child a gentle, loving caress.

caressing.def: 呵護的、愛撫的人 (或物) (愛)
caressing.ex: The soft, caressing breeze felt wonderful on his face.

caretaker.def: 看管人、守門人、臨時代理的、管理者的人物、守護地 (守)
caretaker.ex: The school caretaker looks after the building at night.

careworn.def: 受憂慮折磨的、疲憊的人物
careworn.ex: The old woman had a sad and careworn face.

cargo.col: cargo ship, air cargo, cargo pants
cargo.ex: The massive cargo ship is carrying oil to the north.

caribou.ex: A massive herd of caribou migrated across the tundra.

caricature.def: 諷刺畫、漫畫、滑稽模仿、漫畫化的人的人、模仿地 (諷)
caricature.ex: The artist drew a funny caricature of the politician.

caricaturist.ex: The famous caricaturist was known for his sharp wit.

caries.def: 齲齒、骨疽的人 (或物) (單數)
caries.ex: Sugar is a major cause of painful dental caries.

carillon.ex: The ringing carillon filled the air with sweet music.

caring.def: 有愛心的、關懷的、護理的人 (或物) (愛)
caring.ex: Nursing is considered a very noble and caring profession.

carioca.def: 里約熱內盧人、里約舞的人物、當地地 (里)
carioca.ex: They learned how to dance the carioca in Rio.

carjack.def: 劫車、搶劫車輛的人物、劫車地 (劫)
carjack.ex: They were carjacked while waiting at a red light.

carjacking.def: 劫車罪、搶劫車輛的人 (或物) (劫)
carjacking.ex: There has been a sudden spate of carjackings recently.

carmine.def: 胭脂紅、深紅色、深紅的的人物、深紅地 (紅)
carmine.ex: She applied a rich carmine lipstick to her lips.

carnage.def: 大屠殺、殘殺的人物 (單數)
carnage.ex: The war resulted in a truly terrible carnage of innocent lives.

carnal.def: 肉體的、肉慾的、世俗地 (肉體)
carnal.ex: The monk struggled to suppress his carnal desires.

carnation.def: 康乃馨、粉紅色的人物 (單數)
carnation.ex: He wore a small white carnation in his buttonhole.

carnival.def: 嘉年華、狂歡節、馬戲團、狂歡者的人物、狂歡地 (節)
carnival.ex: The Rio Carnival is the biggest festival in the world.

carnivore.def: 肉食性動物、食蟲植物 (單數)
carnivore.ex: The lion is a natural carnivore that hunts for prey.

carnivorous.ex: The Venus flytrap is a well-known carnivorous plant.

carol.def: (聖誕)頌歌、歡唱的人的人物、歡唱地 (歌)
carol.ex: The children went door to door singing Christmas carols.

carouse.def: 狂歡作樂、痛飲的人的人、狂歡地 (狂)
carouse.ex: They decided to carouse deep into the night after the game.

carousel.def: 旋轉木馬、行李輸送帶 (單數)
carousel.ex: Please wait for your bags at the baggage carousel.

carousing.ex: A long night of carousing left them all very tired.

carp.def: 鯉魚、吹毛求疵、投訴的人物、吹毛地 (魚)
carp.ex: The old woman began to carp about the loud music.

carpenter.def: 木工、木匠、做木工的人、木工的人生地 (木匠)
carpenter.ex: The skilled carpenter built a beautiful oak shelf.

carpentry.def: 木工手藝、木工作品 (單數)
carpentry.ex: He is studying carpentry at the local technical college.

carper.ex: No one liked working with such a constant carper.

carpet.def: 地毯、毛毯、覆蓋層、鋪地毯、覆蓋的人物、鋪地毯地 (毯)
carpet.col: red carpet, magic carpet, wall-to-wall carpet
carpet.ex: The hotel lobby is covered in a thick red carpet.
